summary: Senior software engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proven track record of leading cross-functional teams and delivering high-impact products used by millions of users. Passionate about clean architecture, developer experience, and mentoring junior engineers.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Led development of core payment processing infrastructure serving 500K+ daily transactions. Collaborated with product and design teams to ship new checkout experiences.
achievements: Reduced payment failure rate by 18% by redesigning the retry logic and implementing smarter error classification
Architected and shipped a new real-time fraud detection pipeline processing 50K events/second with sub-10ms latency
Mentored 4 junior engineers, 2 of whom were promoted to mid-level within 18 months

experience.title: Software Engineer II
experience.description: Worked on the Search & Discovery team, building ranking models and backend APIs for the host and guest search experience.
achievements: Built a personalized ranking service in Python/Go that increased booking conversion by 12% in A/B tests
Migrated legacy search infrastructure from Solr to Elasticsearch, reducing query latency by 40%
Owned the full-stack implementation of the Flexible Dates search feature, used by 30% of monthly active users

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Consulted for Fortune 500 clients delivering agile software projects using extreme programming practices. Worked across a range of domains including fintech, healthcare, and retail.
achievements: Delivered 6 production applications in 2 years across 4 different client engagements
Introduced test-driven development practices to a client team of 12 engineers, increasing test coverage from 15% to 82%
Co-led internal React workshop series attended by 40+ engineers across the company
